scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --kill-others-on-fail --names "redirect,web" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "cd apps/redirect-service && bun run dev" "cd apps/management-web && bun run dev"
scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/shared-db && DATABASE_PATH=$(pwd)/../../dev.sqlite bun run migrate
scripts.typecheck: tsgo -p apps/redirect-service/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsgo -p apps/management-web/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsgo -p packages/shared-db/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.biome:check: biome lint apps/redirect-service/src apps/management-web/src apps/management-web/astro.config.mjs packages/shared-db/client.ts packages/shared-db/schema.ts packages/shared-db/drizzle.config.ts packages/shared-db/migrate.ts
scripts.biome:format: biome format apps/redirect-service/src apps/management-web/src apps/management-web/astro.config.mjs packages/shared-db/client.ts packages/shared-db/schema.ts packages/shared-db/drizzle.config.ts packages/shared-db/migrate.ts --write
scripts.test: cd apps/redirect-service && bun test --pass-with-no-tests && cd ../management-web && bun test --pass-with-no-tests
scripts.check-all: bun run format && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
